query:
INSERT INTO identity_image_scan_retry
                (user_id, image_kind, url, last_error)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (user_id, image_kind) DO UPDATE
            SET retry_count = identity_image_scan_retry.retry_count + 1,
                url = EXCLUDED.url,
                last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
                updated_at = now()
